args.query:
SELECT
  replace(trim(o.OwnerId),'#','') as OwnerId,
  AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = replace(trim(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) <= '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY replace(trim(o.OwnerId),'#','')
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
  replace(trim(o.OwnerId),'#','') as OwnerId,
  AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = replace(trim(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) <= '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY replace(trim(o.OwnerId),'#','')
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
